title: Suboptimal muxcover result due to incorrect / overly pessimistic cost estimate

features.name: nested ternary multiplexer tree with clog2-derived selector
features.description: Code should include a nested ternary multiplexer tree where a selector is derived from $clog2 of a parameter and zero-extended to a fixed width

features.name: parameter-driven input sizing with zero padding
features.description: Code should include a parameter-driven input that is zero-extended to a larger fixed width for use in a multiplexer tree
